fields.name: deviceIdentity
fields.description: device identity is set by mobile login

fields.name: main_group_id
fields.description: main user group id

fields.name: main_organization_id
fields.description: main organization id

fields.name: groups
fields.description: a list with all group ids by user

fields.name: organizations
fields.description: a list with all organization ids by user

fields.name: role
fields.description: Resolved role name (from groups → users_roles); empty when no role applies.

fields.name: rights
fields.description: All right keys the user has — derived from groups → roles → users_role_rights at login.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Id of behavioural state

fields.name: name
fields.description: Behavioural state name

fields.name: description
fields.description: Behavioural state description

fields.name: isdeleted
fields.description: If the behavior tag is marked as deleted, you can only view it but no longer use it.

schemas.name: EncounterCategorieDeleteRequest
schemas.description: Soft-delete one encounter category by id.

fields.name: province
fields.description: Provincia of the company seat — feeds AROC datos GENERALES.

fields.name: island
fields.description: Isla — feeds AROC datos GENERALES.

fields.name: port
fields.description: Puerto — feeds AROC datos GENERALES.

fields.name: email
fields.description: Contact e-mail of the company — AROC datos GENERALES.

fields.name: web
fields.description: Public web address of the company — AROC datos GENERALES.

fields.name: aroc_reference
fields.description: AROC authorization reference (Referencia) — written into datos GENERALES B5.

fields.name: aroc_region
fields.description: AROC region code (CAN/RES/AND).

fields.name: aroc_number
fields.description: AROC authorization number (Número).

fields.name: aroc_authorized_boats
fields.description: Number of authorized boats under the AROC reference. 0 = unset.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Vehicle id

fields.name: name
fields.description: Vehicle name (description column in DB)

fields.name: isdeleted
fields.description: Soft-deleted flag

fields.name: organization_id
fields.description: Organization the vehicle belongs to

fields.name: in_use
fields.description: Whether the vehicle is currently active in use. Drives visibility in operational pickers (tour creation, AROC report). Independent of soft-delete.

schemas.name: VehicleDeleteRequest
schemas.description: Body of POST /json/vehicle/delete — soft-deletes the vehicle with the given id.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Vehicle id to delete

schemas.name: SpeciesEntryGroup
schemas.description: Embedded species group info inside SpeciesEntry

fields.name: ottid
fields.description: Open Tree of Life ID

schemas.name: UserData
schemas.description: Used for save and list. extends UserInfoData with credentials and disable flag

fields.name: order
fields.description: Per-column sort directions (id, date, tour_start, tour_end, created/updated, count_sightings, count_trackings). Empty string means do-not-sort.

fields.name: period_from
fields.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD; lower bound for tour date (inclusive)

fields.name: period_to
fields.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD; upper bound for tour date (inclusive)

fields.name: vehicle_id
fields.description: Filter by vehicle id

fields.name: vehicle_driver_id
fields.description: Filter by vehicle driver id

fields.name: organization_id
fields.description: Filter by organization id (only effective when current user has access)

fields.name: search
fields.description: Free-text search applied as LIKE on record_by_persons + tour_fid

schemas.name: ToursFilterOrder
schemas.description: Sort directions per orderable column. Empty string means 'do not sort by this column'.

schemas.name: TypeSighting
schemas.description: Common sighting properties shared between web and mobile request/response shapes

fields.name: tour_fid
fields.description: Sent by the mobile client (computed client-side); the server recomputes via UtilTourFid.createTourFid and ignores this value, but Vts strict mode requires the field to be declared.

fields.name: image
fields.description: Local image filename on the mobile client. Sent by the app, ignored by the server (image upload happens via /mobile/sighting/image/save).

fields.name: beaufort_wind_old
fields.description: Legacy numeric beaufort field — mobile always sends 0 to "reset" the deprecated column. Server ignores it.

fields.name: period_from
fields.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD; lower bound for sighting date (inclusive)

fields.name: period_to
fields.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD; upper bound for sighting date (inclusive)

fields.name: species_id
fields.description: Filter by species id

fields.name: organization_id
fields.description: Filter by organization id

fields.name: vehicle_id
fields.description: Filter by vehicle id

fields.name: vehicle_driver_id
fields.description: Filter by vehicle driver id

fields.name: search
fields.description: Free-text search applied as LIKE on note + recognizable_animals

schemas.name: SightingsEntry
schemas.description: Sighting list entry — extends TypeSighting with response-side fields

fields.name: track_point_count
fields.description: Number of GPS tracking points the boat recorded during the sighting window (segment_count + 1 for source='tracking', omitted for manual_begin_end / no movement row). Lets the list-UI show which sightings actually have a real GPS track.

schemas.name: SightingImageGetRequest
schemas.description: Path params for /json/sightings/getimage/:id/:filename

schemas.name: SightingSaveRequest
schemas.description: Update payload for an existing sighting (admin only). All fields are required; pass empty string / 0 to clear.

fields.name: beaufort_wind
fields.description: Stored in beaufort_wind_n column. May contain decimals like "1.5".

fields.name: location_begin
fields.description: JSON-stringified GeolocationCoordinates ("null" or "" for unset).

fields.name: location_end
fields.description: JSON-stringified GeolocationCoordinates ("null" or "" for unset).

schemas.name: SightingMovementTrackEntry
schemas.description: One segment (point N → point N+1) of a sighting movement, ready for map rendering.

fields.name: sequence_no
fields.description: Position inside the movement (0..N-1)

fields.name: start_lat
fields.description: WGS84 latitude (decimal degrees)

fields.name: start_lon
fields.description: WGS84 longitude (decimal degrees)

fields.name: end_lat
fields.description: WGS84 latitude (decimal degrees)

fields.name: end_lon
fields.description: WGS84 longitude (decimal degrees)

fields.name: start_dt
fields.description: Unix-seconds; 0 when unknown (manual_begin_end source)

fields.name: end_dt
fields.description: Unix-seconds; 0 when unknown

fields.name: distance_m
fields.description: Great-circle distance in metres

fields.name: duration_s
fields.description: end_dt - start_dt in seconds; 0 when timing unknown

fields.name: speed_mps
fields.description: distance_m / duration_s; null when duration_s is 0

fields.name: heading_deg
fields.description: Initial bearing 0..360 (0 = North); null when start==end

fields.name: turning_angle_deg
fields.description: Signed change vs previous heading (-180..180); null for first segment

fields.name: quality
fields.description: 'good' or 'bad' (GPS-jump suspect)

schemas.name: SightingMovementEntry
schemas.description: Per-sighting movement: aggregated header + full segment list. One entry per sighting that has a computed movement.

fields.name: sighting_id
fields.description: Owning sighting id

fields.name: source
fields.description: 'tracking' | 'manual_begin_end' | 'hybrid'

fields.name: segment_count
fields.description: Number of segments in tracks[]

fields.name: total_distance_m
fields.description: Sum of all segment distances

fields.name: total_duration_s
fields.description: Sum of all segment durations

fields.name: avg_speed_mps
fields.description: Mean speed across good segments; null when no timed data

fields.name: max_speed_mps
fields.description: Peak good-segment speed

fields.name: dominant_heading_deg
fields.description: Circular mean of segment headings (0..360)

fields.name: heading_variance_deg
fields.description: "straight vs erratic" proxy

fields.name: bbox_min_lat
fields.description: Bounding box (null when no points)

fields.name: bbox_min_lon
fields.description: Bounding box

fields.name: bbox_max_lat
fields.description: Bounding box

fields.name: bbox_max_lon
fields.description: Bounding box

fields.name: first_dt
fields.description: Unix-seconds of first segment start (0 when unknown)

fields.name: last_dt
fields.description: Unix-seconds of last segment end

fields.name: computed_at
fields.description: Unix-seconds when this row was (re)computed

fields.name: tracks
fields.description: Segments in sequence_no order

schemas.name: SightingMovementListRequest
schemas.description: Body of POST /json/sighting/movement/list — bulk fetch by sighting ids. Missing ids (no computed movement) are omitted from the response.

fields.name: sighting_ids
fields.description: Sighting ids to fetch movements for. Unknown / uncomputed ids are silently skipped in the response.

schemas.name: SightingMovementListResponse
schemas.description: Response of POST /json/sighting/movement/list — movements for the requested sightings.

fields.name: list
fields.description: Movements for the requested sightings (subset).

schemas.name: MovementConfigEntry
schemas.description: Movement-rebuild tunables. Sourced from / written to the `sighting_movement.config` row in the `settings` table. All fields are required on save; the loader fills in defaults when reading a partial row.

fields.name: default_lead_minutes
fields.description: Minutes added before the recorded sighting start, so the rendered track shows the boat's approach. Non-negative.

fields.name: default_trail_minutes
fields.description: Minutes added after the recorded sighting end. Non-negative.

fields.name: prefer_sighting_duration
fields.description: When true, lead/trail buffer is applied around the recorded duration. When false, the recorded duration is used strictly.

fields.name: outlier_speed_kmh
fields.description: GPS-jump detector — segment speeds above this value are flagged as `bad` quality and excluded from aggregates. Positive.

fields.name: default_local_tz
fields.description: IANA timezone used to interpret legacy `duration_from`/`duration_until` HH:MM strings on sightings without a GPS-fix timestamp (e.g. `Atlantic/Canary`). Must be a zone moment-timezone recognises.

schemas.name: MovementConfigResponse
schemas.description: Response body of GET /json/sighting/movement/config and POST /json/sighting/movement/config — current persisted config plus the default statusCode/msg envelope.

fields.name: config
fields.description: Current persisted config. Omitted on error responses (FORBIDDEN / INTERNAL_ERROR).

schemas.name: SightingEnvironmentProvenance
schemas.description: One field-level provenance entry: which value column was produced by which upstream provider id.

fields.name: field
fields.description: Value column the provenance applies to (e.g. 'chl_a_mg_m3_day', 'fishing_hours_day_25km').

fields.name: source
fields.description: Provider id that produced the value (e.g. 'erddap', 'gfw').

schemas.name: SightingEnvironmentEntry
schemas.description: One sighting with its ocean + fishing-effort enrichment columns. Position is denormalized to lon/lat so the frontend doesn't have to re-parse location_begin.

fields.name: lon
fields.description: Longitude (WGS84). Parsed from location_begin JSON server-side.

fields.name: lat
fields.description: Latitude (WGS84). Parsed from location_begin JSON server-side.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Sighting date as stored (YYYY-MM-DD or similar).

fields.name: chl_a_mg_m3_day
fields.description: Surface chlorophyll-a (mg/m³), day mean. NULL = lookup pending or no data.

fields.name: provenance
fields.description: Per-column provenance, serialized from the SightingExtended.provenance + SightingFishingEffort.provenance JSON maps.

fields.name: air_temperature_c_day
fields.description: 2 m air temperature, day mean (°C). From WeatherService / Open-Meteo.

fields.name: uv_index_day
fields.description: UV index, day peak (around solar noon).

fields.name: wave_height_m_day
fields.description: Significant wave height, day mean (m).

schemas.name: SightingEnvironmentListResponse
schemas.description: Response of /json/sightings/environment/list — paginated sighting list with ocean + fishing enrichment columns merged in.

schemas.name: SightingFishingVesselEntry
schemas.description: One fishing vessel that was active in the 25 km buffer of a sighting on the sighting day, as reported by GFW. Hours = apparent fishing hours of THIS vessel inside the buffer that day.

fields.name: vessel_id
fields.description: GFW vessel id (stable across reports). Use for /vessels/{id} lookups.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Vessel name from GFW /vessels/{id} enrichment; empty when not yet fetched.

fields.name: flag
fields.description: ISO-3 country code (ESP, MAR, JPN, ...).

fields.name: gear_type
fields.description: GFW gear-type code: trawlers, longliners, purse_seines, drifting_longlines, ...

fields.name: hours
fields.description: Apparent fishing hours this vessel logged inside the 25 km buffer on the sighting day.

schemas.name: SightingFishingVesselListRequest
schemas.description: Bulk-fetch fishing vessels for a set of sighting ids — same shape as SightingMovementListRequest so the frontend pattern can be reused.

schemas.name: SightingFishingVesselListResponse
schemas.description: Fishing vessels grouped by sighting_id. Sightings with no vessels (no fishing activity / no GFW data / sighting not yet processed) are absent from the list.

fields.name: identity
fields.description: Mobile-side device identifier (UUID-ish).

fields.name: last_sighting_datetime
fields.description: Most recent sighting upload timestamp from this device; 0 if none.

schemas.name: ExternalTourSourceEntry
schemas.description: One row from organization_external_tour_source — provider config for an organization (e.g. FareHarbor pull settings).

fields.name: id
fields.description: Row id. 0 on save means insert.

fields.name: provider
fields.description: Provider key, e.g. 'fareharbor'.

fields.name: company_shortname
fields.description: FareHarbor URL slug (e.g. 'whalewatching-gomera').

fields.name: item_pks
fields.description: Provider item ids to pull (empty array = all items the provider exposes).

fields.name: last_full_pull_at
fields.description: Unix seconds of last successful refresh; 0/undefined = never.

fields.name: last_error
fields.description: Last failure message (cleared on next successful pull).

schemas.name: ExternalTourCustomerType
schemas.description: Per-customer-type pricing breakdown carried inside an ExternalTourEntry.

schemas.name: ExternalTourEntry
schemas.description: One row from external_tour — a planned tour slot pulled from an external booking provider.

fields.name: start_at
fields.description: Local wall-clock start time as unix seconds.

schemas.name: ExternalTourSourceListResponse
schemas.description: List of source-config rows. Extends DefaultReturn for status code envelope.

schemas.name: ExternalTourSourceDeleteRequest
schemas.description: Delete one source-config by id.

schemas.name: ExternalTourListRequest
schemas.description: Filter the planned tour slots by org + UTC window (inclusive).

fields.name: organization_id
fields.description: When omitted, returns slots for every org the caller can see.

fields.name: from_utc
fields.description: Lower-bound start_at_utc in unix seconds (inclusive); default = now.

fields.name: to_utc
fields.description: Upper-bound start_at_utc in unix seconds (inclusive); default = now+60d.

schemas.name: ExternalTourListResponse
schemas.description: Planned tour slots within the requested window.

schemas.name: AisLiveBbox
schemas.description: Bounding box filter for the live AIS list endpoint. Empty omits the spatial filter.

schemas.name: AisLiveListRequest
schemas.description: Request for the live-AIS list endpoint — restricts by recency and optional bounding box.

fields.name: max_age_seconds
fields.description: Max seconds since the latest ping (default 3600 = 1 h). Beyond this a vessel is "stale" and dropped from the response.

schemas.name: AisLiveVesselEntry
schemas.description: Most recent ping per MMSI joined with the static AisVessel metadata. One row per vessel currently in the live buffer.

fields.name: ship_type
fields.description: AIS ship-type code (1..99 per ITU-R M.1371).

fields.name: sog
fields.description: Speed over ground in knots; absent when AIS reports "not available".

fields.name: cog
fields.description: Course over ground in degrees (0..360); absent when AIS reports "not available".

fields.name: received_at
fields.description: Unix-seconds timestamp of the most recent ping.

schemas.name: AisLiveListResponse
schemas.description: List of live AIS vessels.

schemas.name: AisVesselTrackPoint
schemas.description: One downsampled ping from the live buffer — used to draw the vessel's historical track on the live map.

fields.name: received_at
fields.description: Unix seconds.

schemas.name: AisVesselTrackResponse
schemas.description: Chronological track (oldest → newest) for one MMSI inside the requested time window.

schemas.name: AisVesselTrackRequest
schemas.description: Track request — MMSI + optional time-window override.

fields.name: since_seconds
fields.description: How far back to fetch (default 3600 = 1 h). Capped by the live-buffer retention.

schemas.name: MapCacheRequest

fields.name: server
fields.description: Server name for request

schemas.description: Path variables for map cache call

schemas.name: MobileLoginRequest
schemas.description: Extends LoginRequest (email, password) with mobile-specific deviceIdentity and deviceDescription

fields.name: size
fields.description: Mobile sends file size as string (toString()) for compat with the production Dart client.

schemas.name: SightingImageSaveRequest
schemas.description: Multipart fields for /mobile/sighting/image/save (file upload)

fields.name: coordinates
fields.description: Polygon outer ring as number[][] — list of [lon, lat] pairs (wire format kept compatible with the production mobile client which expects element[0]=lon, element[1]=lat).

schemas.name: DefaultMobileV1Return
schemas.description: Mobile-V1 base response: like figtree-schemas DefaultReturn, but statusCode is a number to match the production Dart client (mwpa-app StatusCodes.dart uses int).

fields.name: statusCode
fields.description: HTTP-style status code as number (200, 401, 403, 500, ...).

fields.name: msg
fields.description: Optional message, set on error responses.

fields.name: year
fields.description: Restrict the export to sightings whose date falls within this calendar year. Omit for all years.

fields.name: vehicle_id
fields.description: Restrict the export to one vehicle (boat). Required by AROC: 1 file per boat per semester. Omit to include all boats.

fields.name: semester
fields.description: Half-year filter: 1 = Jan–Jun, 2 = Jul–Dec. Combine with year. Omit for the full year.

fields.name: organization_id
fields.description: Restrict the export to sightings belonging to this organization. Combine with vehicle_id to scope further. Omit to include all organizations the caller has access to.

schemas.name: ExternalReceiverEntry
schemas.description: One row of the external_receiver table — used by the AROC-report receiver picker.

schemas.name: ExternalReceiverListResponse
schemas.description: Response of GET /json/officereport/receivers — used to fill the receiver dropdown.
